visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Setting is a brightly lit Costco warehouse. Two women, one wearing a grey patterned bucket hat and both in ruffled brown off-shoulder tops, stand side-by-side holding oversized yellow rectangular boxes shaped like train tickets. The boxes have 'London to Hogwarts' and train imagery printed on them. (2) Close-up of a product display shelf. Multiple vertical ticket-shaped boxes are organized in a branded 'Harry Potter' tray. The lighting is sharp, highlighting the textures of the cardboard packaging. (3) Scene shifts to an indoor home environment, likely a living room. The two women are seated at a white table, unboxing the large ticket container. They reveal dozens of small, individually wrapped chocolate bars inside, creating a scattered layout on the table. (4) Detailed close-up of the small chocolates being held. One wrapper is silver/blue and the other is white. The unwrapped bars show a chocolate layer on top of a biscuit, with an embossed '9 3/4' logo clearly visible on the surface. (5) The women taste the chocolates, exhibiting expressive facial movements of enjoyment, nodding, and giving thumbs-up gestures. The background shows domestic items including a sofa and a storage bin.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 討論度爆炸高. [Variety]: 味道竟然. [Slogan]: 哈利波特巨大車票巧克力. (2) [Subtitle]: 哈利波特的粉絲們. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們來接你了. [Variety]: 好大好大這車票真的大. (4) [Subtitle]: 經過的人都喊好大. (5) [Subtitle]: 649元 每一包是27塊錢. (6) [Subtitle]: 一定要試試看. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為很多人都拍那麼大袋. (8) [Subtitle]: 好不好吃我們吃了才知道. (9) [Subtitle]: 我會分享給所有. (10) [Subtitle]: 喜歡哈利波特的朋友們. (11) [Subtitle]: 開吃. (12) [Subtitle]: 畢竟需要兩張票才能上車. (13) [Subtitle]: 因為它太重了. (14) [Subtitle]: 巨大車票打開來是. (15) [Subtitle]: 一堆小小車票. (16) [Subtitle]: 有漂亮的冰川藍以. [Variety]: 冰川藍以及白色的包裝. (17) [Subtitle]: 及白色的包裝. (18) [Subtitle]: 它其實單個包裝. (19) [Subtitle]: 也非常有質感. (20) [Subtitle]: 那我們抽出來的樣子是. (21) [Subtitle]: 藍色出來是. (22) [Subtitle]: 黑巧克力配白餅乾. (23) [Subtitle]: 白色是白巧配黑餅乾. (24) [Subtitle]: 上面有九又四分之三月台. [Variety]: 九又四分之三月台的車票. (25) [Subtitle]: 的車票. (26) [Subtitle]: 你真的是可以帶著車票. (27) [Subtitle]: 從頭到尾出發. (28) [Subtitle]: 好漂亮喔. (29) [Subtitle]: 單個送人也很棒. (30) [Variety]: 好吃耶 高於我期望哎. (31) [Subtitle]: 高於我期望哎. (32) [Subtitle]: 白巧這個配的餅乾. (33) [Subtitle]: 太有sense了. (34) [Subtitle]: 然後黑巧力的部分. (35) [Subtitle]: 它的黑巧克力非常濃郁. (36) [Subtitle]: 配下面的香酥餅乾. (37) [Subtitle]: 它餅乾真的很酥脆. (38) [Subtitle]: 很好吃我覺得. [Variety]: 甜度是差不多. (39) [Subtitle]: 甜度是差不多. (40) [Subtitle]: 七分甜是能接受的. (41) [Subtitle]: 然後很濃郁. (42) [Subtitle]: 滿滿巧克力. (43) [Subtitle]: 滿滿的幸福. [Variety]: 值得買!. (44) [Subtitle]: 值得買!. (45) [Subtitle]: 完全不是那種. (46) [Subtitle]: 死甜死甜賣包裝的. (47) [Subtitle]: 很值得買.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 3 blurred shoppers in the background at Costco.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with long dark hair and a grey bucket hat, the other with long dark hair, both wearing matching chocolate-brown off-the-shoulder tops.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a wide, industrial-style Costco warehouse with high ceilings, orange-painted racks, and a 'Pharmacy' sign visible. The second location is a tidy indoor living room with a white table, a light-colored sofa, and a child's toy storage unit in the back.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced female narration in Traditional Chinese opens the track, characterized by high arousal and bright pitch. An upbeat EDM background track with a prominent synthesized kick and clap rhythm plays throughout. Faint warehouse ambiance is detectable behind the voices. (2) A sharp plastic rustling SFX occurs as the packaging is touched, accompanied by a 'ding' sound effect for emphasis. The speakers' voices remain high in pitch and volume. (3) A noticeable shift in room tone occurs; the warehouse noise floor vanishes, replaced by a slightly more resonant indoor domestic environment. The sound of cardboard sliding and multiple small plastic packets shuffling is clear and crisp. (4) A percussive, high-frequency 'crunch' sound effect triggers during the tasting portion. The music maintains a constant 128 BPM. (5) Final vocal wrap-up with a rising intonation. The background music swells slightly in brightness before a clean hard cut silence.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a unique Harry Potter themed chocolate product found at Costco, providing an unboxing experience and a taste review to inform potential buyers and fans of the franchise.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Organic product review style commonly found on social media; no explicit paid partnership labels.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density social media content with professional-grade audio editing and consistent brand recognition.
